title: Google credentials require frequent re-authentication
symptom: The workflow fails due to Google credentials needing re-authentication, requiring the user to sign in repeatedly.
root_cause: OAuth2 tokens for Google services expire after a certain period, necessitating re-authentication. This is problematic for automated workflows that require continuous access without manual intervention.
fix_steps: Create a Service Account for your project
In n8n, create a new credential using 'Service Account' instead of OAuth2
Update your workflow nodes to use the new Service Account credential
agent_instruction: Switch to Service Account authentication for Google services to avoid re-authentication.
